description: Halflings are small, practical folk who enjoy the comforts of home but can rise to remarkable bravery when called upon.

trait.Brave.description: You have advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

trait.Halfling Nimbleness.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.

trait.Luck.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

trait.Naturally Stealthy.description: You can take the Hide action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

trait.Languages.description: You can speak, read, and write Common and Halfling.
